title: Payload — cypherx.guardrails.violation.detected
description: Contract 5 first-cycle payload. Emitted by the Guardrails service when a policy violation is detected on an inbound or outbound payload. Carried inside the Kafka event envelope `payload` field. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields (additionalProperties:true).

agent_id.description: Agent whose traffic triggered the guardrail.

policy.description: Identifier of the guardrail policy that fired.

direction.description: Whether the violation was detected on the request `input` to the model or the `output` returned from it.
